modelNotes: Every remaining fixture winner combination is evaluated exactly through a compressed final-state dynamic program.
Future NRR movement is excluded; teams tied on points and wins share open top-N slots fractionally.
Current NRR is retained for the standings ladder only.
Fixture-impact guidance is computed for the next 1 fixture(s).
